title: Architect Cross-Cutting Concern Offloading
description: Architect API gateways to offload cross-cutting concerns like authentication and authorization. Implement rate limiting and SSL termination at the gateway layer for consistent security. Design a robust gateway strategy for centralized management of non-functional requirements.
objectives: Architect API gateways to offload cross-cutting concerns like authentication and authorization.
Implement rate limiting and SSL termination at the gateway layer for consistent security.
Design a robust gateway strategy for centralized management of non-functional requirements.
